title: AFPM Petitions  EPA for Partial Waiver of the 2024 Cellulosic Biofuel Volumetric Requirements
content: The American Fuel & Petrochemical Manufacturers (AFPM) petitioned the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to exercise its non-discretionary duty to waive a portion of the Renewable Fuel Standards (RFS) for the 2024 compliance year based on a cellulosic biofuel production shortfall. Consistent with its duties under the Clean Air Act (CAA) section 211(o)(5), EPA has been requested to calculate and make available cellulosic waiver credits. The EPAâ€™s failure to exercise its waiver authorities and make credits available will harm U.S. refineries and consumers and create additional volatility in the cellulosic RIN market.
author: Analysts Account
